blocks.content: Kangnan took off her glasses and slipped them into her breast pocket.
Then, as if emulating a wolf, she raised both fists above her face and stepped forward with her left foot, lightly keeping rhythm.
Shirone and his companions were baffled.
Although they were unfamiliar with Ramuai, they could guess that it was some form of fighting stance.
But standing before the gigantic statue of the Thousand-Armed Avalokiteshvara, it seemed rather comical.
Unable to watch any longer, Liria approached with a frown.

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: Hey! What are you doing…?
At that moment, Kangnan's figure blurred.
A high kick, too fast to see, kicked up a trail of dust.
Her instep smashed right across the face of the Thousand-Armed Avalokiteshvara.
The expression on the Thousand-Armed Avalokiteshvara's face turned to one of bewilderment.
It blinked its eyes rapidly, then its hand movements slowed.
Finally, as if sinking into sleep, it was sucked into the deep sea of Okwangbakyojin.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What… what is that…?
The shock experienced by Shirone's group was beyond imagination.
Although trapped in Okwangbakyojin, the moment her kick broke its neck was so startling that Shirone felt his heart could have leapt from his mouth.
Shirone looked down and saw her thigh exposed beneath her tight business skirt.
At the moment of impact, the stocking on her instep had burned away, rolling up to reveal her right leg entirely.
Her muscles tensed up like chiseled sculptures, but soon, the soft subcutaneous fat returned, revealing her smooth, sculpted legs.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who exactly is she?
It occurred to him that she might be a government official.
If a foreign exorcist had come calling, it was insightful to think that any department in her own country might have anticipated the situation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh.
Kangnan breathed out freely, then pulled her glasses out from her pocket and put them back on.
Shirone, having watched quietly, met eyes with his friends and then approached her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Excuse me, who are you? Perhaps from the kingdom…
ack!
As Kangnan suddenly lifted her skirt, Shirone's face turned as red as a beetroot.
She rolled up her stockings, took out a new pair, and began changing them, unaware or indifferent to the boys' covert glances.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: The entity you faced is a mental being from beyond the northern boundary of heaven, codenamed 'Lawmaker'.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Heaven?

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Actually, the Lawmaker is not so dangerous. It's just a simple phenomenon like an aurora.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: But it becomes a headache when the environment changes. The golden time is 72 hours from onset. After that, it evolves exponentially. You barely caught it.
Kangnan pulled her stockings up to her belly button, then smacked down her skirt to straighten it.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Because you judged well, I'll overlook the unilateral actions.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: If the Lawmaker had expanded its range, the military would have been deployed. You saved many lives.
Having said that, Kangnan turned around and put on her high heels.
She adjusted her outfit which had shifted during her kick.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But could you first tell us who you are?
As Shirone removed his hood and approached, Kangnan's eyes narrowed slightly upon seeing his face.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: He looks younger in person. That he could defeat a Lawmaker…
Even an initially awakened Lawmaker is ranked as a B-grade phenomenon by Valkyrie.
A regular angel is A-grade, so essentially, he fought an opponent comparable to a fallen angel.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: But how did he block the law?
If it were the <Magical Sword Armand> given to him as a gift by Princess Uorin, it might have somewhat defended against the law.
But he definitely could not have defeated the Lawmaker with that alone.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Could it be… Mental Transcendance? No, that can't be. An eighteen-year-old couldn't possibly have reached that state.
It is said that all beings ultimately progress towards awakening their divine nature, but because the process is so lengthy, most die without discovering themselves within their given lifespan.
The exception was heaven.
In that place, governed by Anke Lae where lifespans are determined, there are humans who live for hundreds of years and plants that live for hundreds of thousands of years.
This is why the art of divine awakening is called the technology of heaven.
The time to reach enlightenment varies among species; on average, it takes humans 220 years, cats 400 years, monkeys 600 years, snakes 700 years, and foxes 1,000 years.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: If Shirone had indeed achieved a transcendental mental state, then he would have effectively bypassed around 200 years.
It seems there was no exaggeration in the association's evaluation.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Kangnan was not a person of leisure. Furthermore, she was one of the trusted members of the association.
If it hadn't been for the direct orders of her superior, Gaold, she wouldn't have come just to meet a magic school student.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Kangnan recalled the situation at the time.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Are you talking about Shirone Arian of Alpheus Magic School?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Yes. That miserable old school of mine. How it hasn't collapsed yet, I'll never know.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Surely you're not thinking of involving him in this project?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I don't know. Youngest or whatever, I'm not a genius.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: But right now, I'm the best, aren't I?

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Kangnan couldn't deny it. Although not a brilliant student, Gaold was now indisputably the greatest magician in the Kingdom of Thormia.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: That's an exceptional case…

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Ah, forget it. Just do as I say.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: No. In reality, numerous scouts are measuring talent based on performance over time.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: If that's not important, then what is?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: In the end, what matters is what you accomplish.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Kangnan wanted to argue but held her tongue. The man was insane, but sometimes he rendered her speechless.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Mongrel. Since I've reached the pinnacle of magic…

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Being the best isn't about being number one. It's about being an entity completely detached from the hierarchy.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: Sure, following the path others have paved quickly can be considered a talent.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: But look at the world. Those we call the best are illuminating realms of the unknown that humanity could not reach even in a lifetime.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: It's not about being first or second. It's not even on that level.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: There's nothing to compare it to. It's a completely different issue from just following an existing path quickly.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Kangnan mulled over Gaold's words several times.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Do you think Shirone can become the best?

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I can't guarantee it. But his growth rate is breaking norms, and he can wield Ataraxia.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: If these two factors align at the right time, he might just reach that state momentarily.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: If so, he could create at least one more variable.
The 20-year project was still a challenge to the impossible.
In such a scenario, one variable was worth any sacrifice.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: However, Kangnan couldn't accept it. Placing baseless faith in an uncertain subject in a matter as critical as exchanging the lives of all humanity was not prudent.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: I understand. But you know what? The right timing, specific circumstances, momentarily, at least.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Most of what you said is based on assumptions.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: I know. That's why I'm telling you to meet him. Check with your own eyes.

blocks.speaker: Gaold
blocks.content: If there's even a 0.1 percent chance to increase the success rate, shouldn't we use everything at our disposal?
Snapped back from her recollection, Kangnan addressed Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: I am Ahoya Kangnan, the secretary general of the Magic Association.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ma, Magic Association secretary general?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone's eyes widened in surprise. His friends watching from behind couldn't hide their astonishment either.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Being the secretary general was virtually the second highest position in the magic association, a person one might never meet in a lifetime as a magician.
Shirone quickly bowed his head.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Shirone, it's a national emergency. Someone wants to meet you. Let's go to the capital together.
Shirone looked dazed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who wants to meet me?

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Micae Gaold, the president of the Thormia Magic Association.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Micae Gaold?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone's heart raced. It was the most frequently heard name he had never met in his life.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Why would such a high-ranking official seek out Shirone?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is it related to the Ice Queen?

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Correct. The Ice Queen is an entity from heaven. Do you understand what it means for such a being to descend to this world?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could it be?

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Yes. There has been a fissure in Miro's Space-Time.

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: Wait a moment. This Space-Time of Miro's, is it the Barrier of Law mentioned in the prophecies?

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Are you a scholar?

blocks.speaker: Liria
blocks.content: Akeanis.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Ah, I see.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: For now, it's not an immediate crisis. It was a small crack, and it has been repaired for the moment.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: But a crack is always the start of a collapse, and things can only get worse from here.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: We need to prepare for that.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: So, is Ms. Miro right now…

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: That's all I can tell you for now. The rest you'll have to hear directly from my superior.

blocks.speaker: Kangnan
blocks.content: Come with me to the capital.
Shirone looked thoughtful, considering his options.
